summary: Security audit round 3: audited turrets.js, render.js, config.js, behemoth.js, engine.js, ResourceHUD.jsx. Fixed 2 MEDIUM state-corruption vulnerabilities: (1) turret double-kill in tickTurrets — fireLaser lacked alive guard after targeting, handleEnemyKill lacked idempotency. (2) Pulse Wave zombie enemies — applyPulseWave set hp=0 without marking alive=false or processing kills. All 203 tests pass.
